projects.title: GenAI-Powered Academic Analytics and Semantic Question-Answering System (RAG)
projects.description:
Implemented a production-ready GenAI Q&A system integrating SQL data, FAISS semantic search, and LLMs, implementing intent-aware query routing to direct factual queries to SQL retrieval and interpretive queries to RAG.
Achieved 85% Top-5 retrieval accuracy on semantic search benchmarks and reduced information discovery time by 40% through optimized vector embeddings and recommendation logic, deployed system using Gradio and PostgreSQL.
projects.longDescription:
Implemented a production-ready GenAI Q&A system integrating SQL data, FAISS semantic search, and LLMs, implementing intent-aware query routing to direct factual queries to SQL retrieval and interpretive queries to RAG.
Achieved 85% Top-5 retrieval accuracy on semantic search benchmarks and reduced information discovery time by 40% through optimized vector embeddings and recommendation logic, deployed system using Gradio and PostgreSQL.

projects.title: E-Commerce Customer Analytics & Retention Analysis
projects.description:
Built an end-to-end e-commerce analytics project using SQL, Python, and Tableau to analyze ~100K+ transactions, uncovering revenue trends, customer behavior, and key drivers across products and regions.
Performed cohort analysis and RFM segmentation to identify extremely low retention (<1%) and high dependence on at-risk customers, delivering actionable insights to improve customer retention and long-term revenue growth.
projects.longDescription:
Built an end-to-end e-commerce analytics project using SQL, Python, and Tableau to analyze ~100K+ transactions, uncovering revenue trends, customer behavior, and key drivers across products and regions.
Performed cohort analysis and RFM segmentation to identify extremely low retention (<1%) and high dependence on at-risk customers, delivering actionable insights to improve customer retention and long-term revenue growth.

projects.title: Real-Time Warehouse Inventory and AI-Assisted Logistics Optimization System
projects.description:
Designed and engineered a real-time inventory tracking system in Python and Spark across 50+ warehouses, achieving sub-second latency and 100% sync accuracy, and developed ML-based incident resolution models reducing resolution time by 21%.
Improved warehouse-to-delivery workflows using routing analytics, reducing logistics costs by 7.5% and improving pipeline reliability with data quality monitoring.
projects.longDescription:
Designed and engineered a real-time inventory tracking system in Python and Spark across 50+ warehouses, achieving sub-second latency and 100% sync accuracy, and developed ML-based incident resolution models reducing resolution time by 21%.
Improved warehouse-to-delivery workflows using routing analytics, reducing logistics costs by 7.5% and improving pipeline reliability with data quality monitoring.

projects.title: E-Commerce-Customer-Analytics-Retention-Analysis
projects.description: This project analyzes customer behavior, revenue performance, and retention trends in an e-commerce business using the Olist dataset. The goal is to identify key business insights and provide data-driven recommendations to improve customer retention and revenue growth.
projects.longDescription: This project analyzes customer behavior, revenue performance, and retention trends in an e-commerce business using the Olist dataset. The goal is to identify key business insights and provide data-driven recommendations to improve customer retention and revenue growth.

projects.title: warehouse-logistics-optimization
projects.description: 📦 Real-time warehouse logistics optimization system with streaming inventory sync, 🤖 AI-assisted incident resolution, and 🚚 route optimization—achieving 100% inventory accuracy, ~21% faster issue resolution, and ~7.5% cost reduction.
projects.longDescription: 📦 Real-time warehouse logistics optimization system with streaming inventory sync, 🤖 AI-assisted incident resolution, and 🚚 route optimization—achieving 100% inventory accuracy, ~21% faster issue resolution, and ~7.5% cost reduction.

projects.title: BANK-LOAN-ANALYSIS
projects.description: 🚀 Project Overview  Analyzes loan application data to understand customer and financial trends.  Evaluates loan performance metrics like funded amount, repayment amount, interest rates, and debt-to-income ratios.  Identifies good vs. bad loans based on repayment status.  Builds clear data visualizations for monthly trends and regional differences.
projects.longDescription: 🚀 Project Overview  Analyzes loan application data to understand customer and financial trends.  Evaluates loan performance metrics like funded amount, repayment amount, interest rates, and debt-to-income ratios.  Identifies good vs. bad loans based on repayment status.  Builds clear data visualizations for monthly trends and regional differences.
